textPlain: > I have at least a few readers for which the sound of a man's voice saying "government cell phone detected" will elicit a palpable reaction.Can this be recreated as an audio clip for jumpscaring former govt employees?
Why not just rip the audio file off? Would make for a funny DC requestEdit: On second thought this could be an OPSEC problem. Sorry but I don’t know if anyone can help you :(
